description: Use this API to tabulate unused bus numbers within a specified bus number range (activity BUSN). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = busn(buslo, bushi)

parameters.name: buslo
parameters.description: Low limit of bus number range. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: bushi
parameters.description: High limit of bus number range. (input; 999,997, by default).

error_codes.description: starting bus number is greater than ending bus number.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
